summary_en: ¥4.0B upper limit. 2,000,000 shares (2.75% of shares outstanding). Open-market purchase May 15–Sep 7, 2026. All acquired shares to be cancelled Oct 30, 2026.
title_en: Notice regarding decision on acquisition of treasury stock and cancellation of treasury stock (acquisition based on the Articles of Incorporation pursuant to Article 165(2) of the Companies Act; cancellation pursuant to Article 178 of the Companies Act)
translation_en_brief: Takuma Co., Ltd. announced on May 14, 2026 that its board of directors has resolved to acquire and subsequently cancel treasury shares. The company will purchase up to 2,000,000 common shares (2.75% of issued shares outstanding as of April 30, 2026) for an aggregate upper limit of ¥4.0 billion via open-market purchase between May 15 and September 7, 2026. All shares acquired under this program will be cancelled effective October 30, 2026. The stated purposes are to improve capital efficiency and enhance shareholder returns. The actual number of shares to be cancelled will be confirmed after completion of the acquisition phase.
